nasb.text: For this reason we must pay much closer attention to what we have heard, so that we do not drift away from it.

esv.text: Therefore we must pay much closer attention to what we have heard, lest we drift away from it.

cnv.text: 因此，我們必須更加密切注意所聽過的道理，免得我們隨流失去。

ccb.text: 因此，我们必须更加重视所听的道，以免随流漂去。

csbs.text: 因此，我们必须更加留心所听过的事，免得随流漂去。
